name: Los Banos
content: Los Banos is located along Interstate 5. The name translates to “The Bathroom” in Spanish, though I am unsure why. I stopped here once for dinner while on a road trip with my dad. I was fairly tan at the time, while my father had put on slightly too much sunscreen earlier that day. The waitress took my dad’s order in English, before turning to me and continuing the conversation in Spanish despite the fact that I was clearly there with my dad, I am in no way Latino, and I do not speak more than three words of Spanish. The food itself was good and I enjoyed my time at the restaurant. Unfortunately, I cannot recall the name of the restaurant.
